hero.name: Bismarck Barrios
hero.description: I design digital experiences that live between art and code. Dark. Precise. Unfiltered.

about.p1: I'm a Frontend Developer passionate about creating interfaces that not only work correctly, but also delight users. With over 3 years of experience building modern web applications, I specialize in turning complex designs into clean and efficient code.
about.p2: My main stack includes React, Next.js and TypeScript, powered by advanced animations with GSAP and Three.js. I love the intersection between design and development, where user experience comes to life.
about.p3: When I'm not coding, I explore new technologies, contribute to open source projects and share my knowledge with the community.
about.quote: "Code is my brush. The screen, my canvas."

experience.title: My professional journey
experience.quote: Every line of code is an opportunity to create something extraordinary
